title: xyris bicostata var. tillettii
intro: Xyris bicostata var. tillettii, also known as a species of sedge in the family Xyridaceae, is a type of flowering plant native to Queensland, Australia. The plant has been traditionally used in indigenous medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Xyris bicostata var. tillettii include reducing swelling and pain, as well as promoting wound healing, due to its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory compounds. Herbal preparations of Xyris bicostata var. tillettii typically involve infusions or decoctions of the plant's leaves or roots, which can be used to treat various ailments, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
